name: Qantas Frequent Flyer
one_liner: Earn Qantas points on flights, everyday spending, and hundreds of AU partner brands.
benefit: Earn Qantas points on Qantas flights, Woolworths Everyday Rewards, Uber, wine clubs, hotels, and credit card partners; redeem for domestic/international flights, upgrades, and gift cards.

how_to_join.action: Join at qantas.com — a joining fee (~$99.50 AUD) applies unless a free-join promotion is active
how_to_join.detail: Search OzBargain for 'Qantas FF free join' before paying; free-join promos run several times a year.

how_to_join.action: Link your Everyday Rewards card in the Qantas app to earn on Woolworths spending
Add your QFF number to Uber, car-hire, and hotel booking profiles to earn on every trip

prerequisites: ~$99.50 joining fee unless a current free-join promotion applies — wait for an OzBargain promo
risks: Do not pay the joining fee — wait for a free-join promotion (multiple per year on OzBargain)
Points expire after 18 months of inactivity
Best redemption value is for business-class flights; economy cash redemptions offer modest value
est_value: Variable — best value for flight upgrades; worth joining (free) before your first Qantas flight
